prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 17871→13567→11226→14180→16670，呈先升后降再升的波动走势；2025 年基准约 16670 名，较 2024 年（14180）后移约 2490 名，近 2 年累计后移约 5444 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 39 人，2024 年增至 40 人，2025 年缩减至 35 人；2026 年计划 43 人，较 2025 年扩招约 22.9%，扩招幅度较大，预计竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 70 名（2026 年），近年排名在 64–70 之间波动，整体稳定；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报涉嫌抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查；抖音热度一般（总排名第 81 位），主要视频内容亦围绕该学术不端舆情，对报考心理有一定抑制；地质学 A、考古学 A、软件工程 A-，其中软件工程与物理类招生专业（软件工程、计算机科学与技术、电子信息类等）直接相关，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、计算 机类、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与西北大学物理类招生专业（电子信息类、计算机科学与技术、软件工程等）高度匹配；本省 2026 年考生总数约 299000 人，按近年比例估算物理类约 206310 人，与 2025 年（207171）基本持平，竞争压力未明显变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次后移趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招（+22.9%）以及声誉偏负面等因素，在 2025 年基准 16670 名基础上，再结合扩招后竞争加剧及声誉偏负面信号做小幅修正；预测最低位次约 19006 名，区间 18506–19506 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（通信工程、电子信息工程等）
- 计算机科学与技术（人工智能实验班）
- 数学与应用数学（熊庆来班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（应用物理学、材料物理等）
- 软件工程
- 生物科学（基地班）
- 金融数学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 地质工程
- 地理科学类（自然地理与资源环境等）
- 环境科学与工程
- 生态学（生物多样性与生态安全）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 18506–19506 内，建议以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（≤18506）可重点冲刺电子信息类、计算机科学与技术等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（≥1 9506）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 17871→13567→11226→14180→16670, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; the 2025 baseline is about 16670, which is about 2490 places lower than 2024 (14180), with a cumulative decline of about 5444 places over the past 2 years; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 39 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 40 in 2024, and reduced to 35 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 43 students, an increase of about 22.9% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which is expected to intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 70th (2026), with recent rankings fluctuating between 64 and 70, overall stable; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving an incident where Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the College of Literature was reported for suspected plagiarism, and the school has established a special task force to investigate; Douyin popularity is average (81st overall), with main video content also revolving around this academic misconduct incident, which has a certain dampening effect on application psychology; Geology A, Archaeology A, Software Engineering A-, among which Software Engineering is directly related to physics category enrollment majors (Software Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information, etc.), which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly matching the physics category enrollment majors of Northwest University (Electronic Information, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc.); the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 299,000, with an estimated physics category of about 206,310 based on recent proportions, basically flat compared to 2025 (207,171), with no significant change in competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the declining ranking trend in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+22.9%), and the somewhat negative reputation, a small correction is made based on the 2025 baseline of 16670, taking into account intensified competition after expansion and negative reputation signals; the predicted minimum ranking is about 19006, with a range of 18506–19506.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Computer Science and Technology (Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Xiong Qingling Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (Applied Physics, Materials Physics, etc.)
- Software Engineering
- Biological Science (Base Class)
- Financial Mathematics
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Geological Engineering
- Geographical Sciences (Physical Geography and Resource Environment, etc.)
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Ecology (Biodiversity and Ecological Security)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18506–19506, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (≤18506), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Electronic Information and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (≥19506), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1667→1637→2519→2704→2645. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 1600, but from 2023 onward, it significantly shifted to above 2500. The baseline for 2025 is about 2645, a slight forward shift of about 59 places compared to 2024 (2704). The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 18 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 19 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 11 students, a substantial reduction of about 42.1% compared to 2025, indicating significantly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 70th (2026), stable in recent years. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving an alleged plagiarism incident by Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the College of Liberal Arts, for which the university has established a special task force for investigation. Douyin popularity is average (81st overall), with main video content also revolving around this academic misconduct incident, which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. Archaeology is rated A, directly related to the liberal arts group's admission majors (Archaeology, History), exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese, and other popular liberal arts majors are socially hot and recommended, matching Northwest University's liberal arts group admission majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.). The total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 299,000, with an estimated history category of about 92,690 based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 2.9% compared to 2025 (90,087), leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the basically stable ranking in 2025, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-42.1%), and the somewhat negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 2645, with minor adjustments for intensified competition due to enrollment reduction and negative reputation signals, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2000, with a range of 1500–2500.

- Archaeology
- History (Base Class)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1500–2500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (≤1500), you can prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Archaeology and History Base Class. If your ranking is near the upper bound (≥2500), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
